roa.docketEntryComment: DEF ATC MOTION FOR RESOLUTION/DISPOSITION FILED

/CAL: SENTENCE/X:THE DEFENDANT HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER IN COUNTS 1& 2 IS ORDERED AS FOLLOWS:/X:PAY RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT AS DETERMINED BY APD,/AJW/CH3:ISS: PROB 1 Y:PJ 73D/CTS: 73/4019HALF/SA2: CHASE BANK AT 1811 19TH AVE IN SF/SAORD3/SAORD/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/CTORD: PROBATION MAY BE CONVERTED TO COURT PROBATION WHEN RESTITUTIONIS PAID UPON PROPER FILING OF MOTION & CR-110 IS FILED/

/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS  COUNT(S) 1 & 2 PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION RESULTING FROM DISMISSED COUNTS MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COUNT 3,//X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 3,  PC 594(B)1, A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/ /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST& CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DISM3/
/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION FOR DISPOSITION/ACM/X: THE FUTURE COURT DATE OF 04-05-22 FOR PREHEARING CONFERENCE IS CONFIRMED/DOP/X: CASE REMAINS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO07-13-21/X: BAIL SET AT $10000/CONTD:BENCH WARRANT STAY/DOP/
/CAL:RELEASE FROM CUSTODY/OR/VD:06-14-21 PX DATE/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSETO VACATE THE PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 06-14-21/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/TE:45 MIN/LDPX:06-02-21 (30TH DAY) 06-21-21 (60TH DAY)/987,2/ORMS/SAORD/SA2:1181 19TH AVE,,SF/SAORD3/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET/OR/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/X: CASE REMAINS IN LOVEWAIVER STATUS/
